itinerary.title: Bali Ubud Love Escape
itinerary.overview:
Ubud – The Heart of Romantic Bali 05 Nights / 06 Days ITINERARY SUMMARY Serial Code: ID-002 | Category: Honeymoon Destinations Covered: Ubud, Bali | Duration: 5N/6D

TOUR OVERVIEW
Escape to the serene landscapes of Ubud with this TRAGUIN curated honeymoon experience. Our Ubud Love Escape package offers luxury stays nestled in lush tropical jungles, providing a tranquil and romantic setting for your premium Bali holiday. From private villa experiences to intimate cultural tours, TRAGUIN ensures your time in Ubud is filled with unforgettable memories. DAY WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: ID-002 | Bali Ubud Love Escape | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Bali package (ID-002 / TRAGUIN-BALI-002): Ubud, Bali | Duration: 5N/6D with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN UBUD - A DREAMY WELCOME

days.title: ARRIVAL IN UBUD - A DREAMY WELCOME
days.description: Arrive in Bali and take a private transfer to your handpicked hotel in the lush heart of Ubud. Enjoy a relaxing evening with a floral bath and a romantic dinner setup by TRAGUIN experts. Overnight: Luxury Villa, Ubud | Meals: Dinner
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: UBUD - NATURE’S EMBRACE
days.description: Explore the iconic Tegalalang Rice Terraces and the Sacred Monkey Forest. Experience scenic beauty and take photos at the most popular Instagram spots in Ubud. Overnight: Ubud | Meals: Breakfast, Dinner
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: UBUD - WELLNESS & RELAXATION
days.description: Indulge in a couple’s spa retreat. TRAGUIN recommends a traditional Balinese massage in a jungle-view setting. Spend the evening at a boutique cafe in downtown Ubud. Overnight: Ubud | Meals: Breakfast, Dinner
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: UBUD - CULTURAL EXPLORATION
days.description: Visit the Ubud Art Market for local souvenirs. Participate in a private cooking class to learn the flavors of Bali—another exclusive experience curated by TRAGUIN. Overnight: Ubud | Meals: Breakfast, Dinner
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: UBUD - WATERFALL ADVENTURE
days.description: Discover the hidden gems of Ubud, including the stunning Tegenungan Waterfall. Enjoy a final romantic evening with a private dinner under the stars. Overnight: Ubud | Meals: Breakfast, Dinner
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: FAREWELL BALI
days.description: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast before your private transfer to the airport. TRAGUIN ensures a seamless end to your perfect Ubud Love Escape.
